zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Basset Lord of Headington於1156年出生在英國奧可福爾希阿丁頓時，他的父親Thomas Basset26歲，母親Adeliza Dunstanville22歲。他於1177年與Philippa Malbank在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1220年在英國英格蘭戴文特福德享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Basset Lord of Headington于1156年出生在英国奧可福爾希阿丁頓时，他的父亲Thomas Basset26岁，母亲Adeliza Dunstanville22岁。他于1177年与Philippa Malbank在英国英格兰奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1220年在英国英格兰戴文特福德享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Basset Lord of Headington was born in 1156, in Headington, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Thomas Basset, was 26 and his mother, Adeliza Dunstanville, was 22. He married Philippa Malbank in 1177, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 8 daughters. He died in 1220, in Whitford, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Basset Lord of Headington est né en 1156, à Headington, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Basset, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Adeliza Dunstanville, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Philippa Malbank en 1177, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé en 1220, à Whitford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Basset Lord of Headington 1156 in Headington, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Basset 26 und seine Mutter Adeliza Dunstanville 22. Er hat 1177 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Philippa Malbank geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 8 Töchter. Er starb 1220 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Whitford, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Basset Lord of Headington è nato il nel 1156 nel Headington, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Basset, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Adeliza Dunstanville, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Philippa Malbank nel 1177, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1220, nel Whitford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Basset Lord of Headingtonが1156年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヘディントンで生まれた時，父Thomas Bassetは26歳，母Adeliza Dunstanvilleは22歳であった。1177年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでPhilippa Malbankと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1220年にイギリスイギリスデボンウィトフォードで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Basset Lord of Headington(이)가 1156년 영국 스퍼드실르 헤딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Basset(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeliza Dunstanville(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1177년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 Philippa Malbank(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 휘트퍼드에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Basset Lord of Headington nasceu em 1156, em Headington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Basset, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza Dunstanville, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Philippa Malbank em 1177, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1220, em Whitford, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Basset Lord of Headington родился в 1156 г. в местности хидингтон, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Basset было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeliza Dunstanville, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Philippa Malbank в 1177 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 8 дочерей. Он умер в 1220 г. в местности уитфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Basset Lord of Headington nació en 1156, en Headington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Basset, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Adeliza Dunstanville, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Philippa Malbank en 1177, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 8 hijas. Murió en 1220, en Whitford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años.
